title: Frontend API helper treats every response as a valid JSON CommandResult
description: The dashboard api helper ignores HTTP status and unconditionally parses JSON. Static 404s, server errors, interrupted requests, or non-envelope responses will throw into React effects instead of rendering an error state. Affected: src/dashboard/client/src/api.ts. Fix by catching fetch/parse failures and returning a consistent CommandResult error.
resolution: Fixed by wrapping fetch and JSON parsing failures in a normal CommandResult error envelope, and by converting non-ok HTTP responses without errors into an unexpected_error result.
